body.title: [sprint] BUG: day-close-audit (+ other skills) reference retired wild_igor/igor + lab/ paths
body.description:
**Problem:** The /day-close-audit skill is written for the OLD architecture â€” its steps grep/psql against `wild_igor/igor/`, `lab/claudecode/...`, `IGOR_HOME_DB_URL`, and tools that no longer exist (`docs_sync.py`, `github_sync.py` are gone post-migration; `prune_emissions` import path moved). On the 2026-06-19 day-close most static steps returned empty or errored and had to be hand-adapted to `devices/igor/`, `unseen_university/`, and `devlab/claudecode/`. Other skills likely share the same dead refs.

**Proposed shape:** Sweep the skills under ~/.claude/skills/ (canonical source is repo skills/) for retired path tokens (`wild_igor/igor`, `lab/claudecode`, `lab/design_docs_for_igor`, `THEIGORS_HOME`, removed tools docs_sync/github_sync) and repoint to current locations or delete the obsolete step. Prioritize day-close-audit (it's the mandatory day-close gate and is currently mostly inert).

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/SKILL.md (+ repo skills/ mirror); audit step scripts; sweep other SKILL.md for the same tokens.
**Design rules:** skills-live-in-repo (repo skills/ is canonical); filesystem-memory-store (devlab/runtime/memory).
**Scope boundary:** IN â€” repoint/remove dead path+tool refs in day-close-audit and any skill with the same tokens; verify each step runs against current architecture. OUT â€” redesigning the audit's check set; the slate-location work (T-slate-location-canonical-devlab).
**Test plan:** Run each day-close-audit step against the live repo; assert no step errors on a missing path/tool. Grep skills/ for the retired tokens â†’ 0 after fix.
**Completion criteria:** grep of skills/ for `wild_igor/igor`, `lab/claudecode`, `docs_sync.py`, `github_sync.py` returns 0 live refs; day-close-audit runs end-to-end with no path/tool errors.
